name: Brick Off-Road Explorer

generation.geometry: rounded boxes, torus arches and tires, cylinders, procedural rails, and instanced repetition systems
generation.materials: runtime-generated independent albedo, roughness, normal, and ambient-occlusion textures
generation.transientHeightFieldForNormalGeneration: non-retained scalar field used only to derive the normal texture; ambient occlusion is derived independently from cavity and dirt fields
repetition: 64-76 tire tread blocks with equal cadence on all four wheels

actionReadiness.runtimeMetadata: Serializable IDs stay in root.userData; live Object3D references are returned as result.runtime

baseConfiguration: brick-offroad-base exactly mirrors the base ObjectSculptSpec palettes, roughness values, and repetition counts
variantControls: brick-variant-config.json is validated against the production ObjectSculptSpec variants
